series_metadata.series_description: Drafts of proposals and contracts for each bargaining unit that are produced at various stages in the negotiations process. Files may be in electronic form or paper. Proposals are in draft form until they are provided to the other party in negotiations. Contract draft may be produced for housekeeping reviews. After each revision, the old draft must be destroyed.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office area superseded by revised drafts ; Electronic: in office area superseded by revised drafts
